title: Fix Happy Clients count in Testimonials page to show 500,000+

requirements.text: In the Testimonials page (frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx), update the 'Happy Clients' statistic value from '10,000+' (or any variant like '10000+') to '500,000+'. All other content, layout, styling, and functionality on the page must remain exactly as-is.

quotes: When I open testimonials from the open links section, happy clients comes as 10000plus ,change it to 500000 plus rest everything should be same

acceptanceCriteria: The Testimonials page displays '500,000+' (or '500000+') for the Happy Clients count.
No other text, card, rating, layout, or styling on the Testimonials page is changed.
The Home page (Home.tsx) Happy Clients count is also verified to show '500,000+' if it references the same stat.

constraints: Do not change any other content, layout, or styling on the Testimonials page.
Only update the Happy Clients numeric value — no other modifications.
nonGoals: Redesigning or restyling the Testimonials page.
Modifying backend data or any other pages beyond the Happy Clients count fix.
